rationale: In the citing paper, Ailawadi et al. (2007) is cited briefly to note that its strong consumption-effect finding is consistent with the authors' results. It is also referenced once as an example of promotion-induced repeat purchases (state dependence) that the citing model explicitly does not include for tractability. The citation is not used as a core methodological or conceptual basis for the model, hypotheses, or decomposition procedure, so its role is mainly contextual.
